requirement_topic.en: Malaysia Market Access — ST Certificate of Approval, SIRIM Certification and Label, In-Country Importer
requirement_topic.zh: 马来西亚市场准入——ST批准证书、SIRIM认证及标签、在地进口商
requirement_topic.zht: 馬來西亞市場准入——ST批准證書、SIRIM認證及標籤、在地進口商

summary.en: Non-Malaysian manufacturers placing portable lithium batteries or power banks on the Malaysian market must satisfy several market-access obligations: (1) Energy Commission (Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST) Certificate of Approval — where the product is regulated electrical equipment under the Electricity Regulations 1994, a CoA must be obtained before sale, import, or display, conditioned on demonstrated safety conformity. (2) SIRIM certification and label — SIRIM QAS International is the principal certifying body; certified products bear the SIRIM safety/conformity label (and, for wireless products, the SIRIM/MCMC mark and certificate number). (3) In-country importer or registrant — a Malaysia-established importer is the responsible local party for the CoA application and for liability toward the regulator. (4) Customs and trade — import is via Royal Malaysian Customs declaration; primary entry points include Port Klang and the Port of Tanjung Pelepas. There is no single CE-style self-declaration; conformity is third-party certified by SIRIM and approved by ST.
summary.zh: 非马来西亚制造商将便携式锂电池或移动电源投放马来西亚市场，须满足多项市场准入义务：（1）能源委员会（Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST）批准证书——产品在《1994年电力条例》下属受监管电气设备时，须在销售、进口或陈列前取得CoA，以经证明的安全合格为条件。（2）SIRIM认证及标签——SIRIM QAS International为主要认证机构；认证产品须粘贴SIRIM安全/合格标签（无线产品另须SIRIM/MCMC标志及证书编号）。（3）在地进口商或注册人——在马来西亚设立的进口商为CoA申请及对监管机构承担责任的在地责任方。（4）海关及贸易——经马来西亚皇家海关申报进口；主要入境口岸包括巴生港及丹绒帕拉帕斯港。马来西亚没有单一CE式自我声明；合格性由SIRIM第三方认证并经ST批准。
summary.zht: 非馬來西亞製造商將便攜式鋰電池或行動電源投放馬來西亞市場，須滿足多項市場准入義務：（1）能源委員會（Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST）批准證書——產品在《1994年電力條例》下屬受監管電氣設備時，須在銷售、進口或陳列前取得CoA，以經證明的安全合格為條件。（2）SIRIM認證及標籤——SIRIM QAS International為主要認證機構；認證產品須粘貼SIRIM安全/合格標籤（無線產品另須SIRIM/MCMC標誌及證書編號）。（3）在地進口商或註冊人——在馬來西亞設立的進口商為CoA申請及對監管機構承擔責任的在地責任方。（4）海關及貿易——經馬來西亞皇家海關申報進口；主要入境口岸包括巴生港及丹絨帕拉帕斯港。馬來西亞沒有單一CE式自我聲明；合格性由SIRIM第三方認證並經ST批准。

standards_or_laws: Electricity Supply Act 1990 (Act 447) and Electricity Regulations 1994 — Certificate of Approval (Energy Commission / ST)
SIRIM QAS International certification scheme — third-party conformity assessment and SIRIM label
Communications and Multimedia Act 1998 — MCMC type approval for wireless products (where applicable)
Customs Act 1967 — Royal Malaysian Customs import declaration

summary.en: China's domestic market access for lithium battery products uses a different framework: CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA/SAMR) is mandatory for certain rechargeable battery product categories sold domestically (e.g., mobile-phone lithium batteries are CCC-listed). CCC is a Chinese domestic-market requirement and is NOT recognised in Malaysia; it does not substitute for an ST Certificate of Approval or SIRIM certification. Chinese manufacturers do not need a Malaysian importer for domestic Chinese sales, and there is no Chinese equivalent of the ST/SIRIM third-party approval-plus-label regime for exporters.
summary.zh: 中国国内锂电池产品市场准入采用不同框架：CCC（中国强制认证，由CNCA/SAMR管理）对某些在国内销售的可充电电池产品类别为强制性（如手机锂电池已列入CCC目录）。CCC属中国国内市场要求，不被马来西亚认可，不可替代ST批准证书或SIRIM认证。中国制造商在国内销售时无需马来西亚进口商，对于出口商也没有等同于ST/SIRIM第三方批准加标签制度的中国对应制度。
summary.zht: 中國國內鋰電池產品市場准入採用不同框架：CCC（中國強制認證，由CNCA/SAMR管理）對某些在國內銷售的可充電電池產品類別為強制性（如手機鋰電池已列入CCC目錄）。CCC屬中國國內市場要求，不被馬來西亞認可，不可替代ST批准證書或SIRIM認證。中國製造商在國內銷售時無需馬來西亞進口商，對於出口商也沒有等同於ST/SIRIM第三方批准加標籤制度的中國對應制度。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in Malaysia
GB 31241-2022 — domestic safety baseline referenced for export documentation

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting portable batteries to Malaysia face market-access gaps with no Chinese domestic equivalent: (1) where in scope, an Energy Commission (ST) Certificate of Approval is required before sale, import, or display — there is no CE-style self-declaration; (2) third-party SIRIM certification and the SIRIM label are mandatory, and CCC does not transfer; (3) a Malaysia-established importer or registrant must hold local responsibility and file the CoA application; (4) wireless products additionally need MCMC type approval and the SIRIM/MCMC mark; (5) labelling must carry Malaysian certificate references rather than the CCC mark. Total compliance cost includes SIRIM certification and testing fees, CoA application fees, importer arrangements, and (for wireless) MCMC certification fees.
gap.zh: 向马来西亚出口便携式电池的中国制造商面临在中国国内无对应制度的市场准入差距：（1）产品在适用范围内时，须在销售、进口或陈列前取得能源委员会（ST）批准证书——没有CE式自我声明；（2）第三方SIRIM认证及SIRIM标签为强制性，CCC不可转用；（3）须有在马来西亚设立的进口商或注册人承担在地责任并提交CoA申请；（4）无线产品另须MCMC型号核准及SIRIM/MCMC标志；（5）标签须载明马来西亚证书信息，而非CCC标志。合规总成本包括SIRIM认证及测试费、CoA申请费、进口商安排，以及（无线产品）MCMC认证费。
gap.zht: 向馬來西亞出口便攜式電池的中國製造商面臨在中國國內無對應制度的市場准入差距：（1）產品在適用範圍內時，須在銷售、進口或陳列前取得能源委員會（ST）批准證書——沒有CE式自我聲明；（2）第三方SIRIM認證及SIRIM標籤為強制性，CCC不可轉用；（3）須有在馬來西亞設立的進口商或註冊人承擔在地責任並提交CoA申請；（4）無線產品另須MCMC型號核准及SIRIM/MCMC標誌；（5）標籤須載明馬來西亞證書信息，而非CCC標誌。合規總成本包括SIRIM認證及測試費、CoA申請費、進口商安排，以及（無線產品）MCMC認證費。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — Energy Commission (ST) Certificate of Approval for regulated electrical equipment, third-party SIRIM certification and label, an in-country importer/registrant, and MCMC type approval for wireless products are required before placing the product on the Malaysian market
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of an ST Certificate of Approval, SIRIM third-party certification, or Malaysian importer obligation applies to Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese portable battery and power bank exporters must address Malaysian market-access obligations before entry: an Energy Commission (ST) Certificate of Approval where in scope, third-party SIRIM certification with the SIRIM label, a Malaysia-established importer or registrant, and MCMC type approval for any wireless function. Unlike the EU, there is no self-declaration route — conformity is third-party certified by SIRIM and approved by ST. CCC certification does not transfer to or substitute for any of these Malaysian requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国便携式电池及移动电源出口商在进入马来西亚市场前，须应对市场准入义务：产品在适用范围内时的能源委员会（ST）批准证书、带SIRIM标签的第三方SIRIM认证、在马来西亚设立的进口商或注册人，以及任何无线功能的MCMC型号核准。与欧盟不同，马来西亚没有自我声明路径——合格性由SIRIM第三方认证并经ST批准。CCC认证无法转移或替代上述任一马来西亚要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國便攜式電池及行動電源出口商在進入馬來西亞市場前，須應對市場准入義務：產品在適用範圍內時的能源委員會（ST）批准證書、帶SIRIM標籤的第三方SIRIM認證、在馬來西亞設立的進口商或註冊人，以及任何無線功能的MCMC型號核准。與歐盟不同，馬來西亞沒有自我聲明路徑——合格性由SIRIM第三方認證並經ST批准。CCC認證無法轉移或替代上述任一馬來西亞要求。

source.publisher: Energy Commission of Malaysia (Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST) — Certificate of Approval for electrical equipment
